canonicalSkill.name: guard-rails-audit
canonicalSkill.description: Use when asked to inspect Forge L1 rail enforcement, audit events, or protected path policy.

sources.label: S1
sources.summary: Claude Code project skills live under .claude/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md and use description metadata for automatic invocation.

sources.label: S2
sources.summary: Cursor Project Rules live under .cursor/rules as .mdc files; Agent Requested rules are description-driven.

sources.label: S3
sources.summary: Codex skills use SKILL.md frontmatter name and description to determine when the skill gets used.

sources.label: S4
sources.summary: Forge packages repository Codex skills from .codex/skills for installation into $CODEX_HOME/skills.

proofBoundary.reason: closed-source harness model invocation is outside this deterministic fixture; .codex/skills is the Forge repository packaging surface, not proof of direct Codex runtime discovery
